name: mcwilliams_live_debug_vulnerable_2026-04-30
description: Harness-only vulnerable/night restage of the McWilliams live-debug fixture for writhing-stalker shadow/strike proof. It rewrites the copied player save to local midnight and lowers the player to 60% HP, low stamina, and a torso bleed effect so live opportunity scoring can prove a strike window without synthesizing stalker state.
